mapper.select:
select * from notice_tbl
notice_public = 1
and notice_category = #{noticeCategory}
order by notice_fixed desc, notice_date desc
select notice_no, notice_title, notice_content, notice_date, notice_view, notice_category, notice_image_path from notice_tbl where notice_no = #{noticeNo}

select member_id, qna_no, qna_title, qna_content, qna_answer, qna_status, qna_date, qna_answer_image, qna_question_image, qna_category from qna_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} order by qna_status desc, qna_date desc
mapper.insert: insert into qna_tbl values( qna_seq.nextval, #{memberId}, #{qnaTitle}, #{qnaContent}, null, 0, sysdate, null, #{qnaQuestionImage}, #{qnaCategory} )
